sentences.arabic: بَدَأَتِ الدِّرَاسَةُ فِي الْمَدْرَسَةِ بَعْدَ الإِجَازَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nastava u školi počela je nakon odmora.
sentences.translationEn: School started again after the holiday break.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ الطُّلَّابُ بِحَقَائِبَ جَدِيدَةٍ وَوُجُوهٍ مُبْتَسِمَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Učenici su došli s novim torbama i nasmiješenim licima.
sentences.translationEn: Students came with new bags and smiling faces.

sentences.translation: Nastavnici su se predstavili novim učenicima.
sentences.translationEn: The teachers introduced themselves to the new students.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْيَوْمُ الأَوَّلُ مُثِيرًا وَمَلِيئًا بِالنَّشَاطِ.
sentences.translation: Prvi dan bio je uzbudljiv i pun aktivnosti.
sentences.translationEn: The first day was exciting and full of activity.
